auth_method: Bearer token via OAuth 2.0 client credentials grant
rate_limit: 600 requests per minute per API key; burst allowance of 50 additional requests
api_description: The Inventory Search endpoint enables warehouse management systems to query real-time stock levels across multiple fulfillment centers. It supports full-text search on SKU descriptions, barcode lookups, and dimensional filtering. Results include bin location, last count date, and replenishment status.
endpoint_summary: Search inventory across fulfillment centers with filtering and pagination
idempotent: Yes — identical search payloads return consistent results within the same snapshot window

parameters.name: X-Warehouse-Region
parameters.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 region code limiting the search scope to fulfillment centers in that region

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: Client-generated idempotency key for request deduplication within a 5-minute window

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for paginated results. Pages are 1-indexed.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of inventory records per page

request_body_description: JSON object containing search criteria. At least one of `query`, `sku`, or `barcode` must be provided.

response_codes.description: Search completed successfully. Body contains paginated inventory results with total count, page metadata, and an array of matching inventory records.
Request validation failed. Common causes: missing required search field, invalid filter value, or per_page exceeding 200.
Bearer token is missing, expired, or does not have the inventory:read scope.
Authenticated principal lacks access to the specified warehouse region.
Rate limit exceeded. Retry-After header indicates seconds until the next available request window.
Inventory index is temporarily unavailable due to a reindexing cycle. Typically resolves within 30 seconds.

success_response_example:
{
  "total": 37,
  "page": 1,
  "per_page": 50,
  "results": [
    {
      "sku": "ELC-BATT-48V-20AH",
      "description": "Lithium Iron Phosphate Battery Pack 48V 20Ah",
      "barcode": "8901234567890",
      "quantity_on_hand": 184,
      "bin_location": "FC-ORD-3 / Aisle 12 / Rack B / Shelf 4",
      "fulfillment_center": "Chicago-ORD-3",
      "last_counted": "2026-03-04T08:15:00Z",
      "replenishment_status": "adequate",
      "unit_weight_kg": 6.2
    }
  ]
}
additional_notes: Search results are computed against a near-real-time index that is refreshed every 15 seconds from the transactional inventory database. During peak warehouse operations, index lag may increase to 60 seconds. For transactions requiring exact-count guarantees (e.g., order reservation), use the /inventory/{sku}/reserve endpoint instead, which reads directly from the primary database.
